summary: Update mode: Tested Chinese Metaphysical Calendar features. Added 5 new backend tests verifying day_officer, day_officer_chinese, day_stem_branch, day_zodiac, is_forgiveness_day, business_quality, business_description, officer_good_for, officer_avoid fields. Added 2 new frontend tests for the Chinese Calendar card (day-officer-card) in Dashboard. All 29 backend and 35 frontend tests pass.
seed_data_creation: No persistent seed data. Test users auto-created per test via onboarded_client fixture and cleaned by garbage collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Chinese Calendar features fully tested. LuckScoreResponse includes day_officer, day_officer_chinese, day_stem_branch, day_zodiac, is_forgiveness_day, business_quality, business_description, officer_good_for, officer_avoid. Week forecast also includes these fields. Dashboard day-officer-card (data-testid) shows Chinese Calendar, Day Officer, Business Day, Day Zodiac labels. All 5 backend Chinese calendar tests (test_chinese_calendar_fields_present, test_day_officer_calculation, test_business_quality_values, test_week_forecast_includes_chinese_calendar) and 2 frontend tests (dashboard shows Chinese Calendar card with Day Officer, dashboard Chinese Calendar card shows non-empty business quality) pass. test@astro.com / test123 is the existing stable user for login-only dashboard tests.
